query: SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN ratingCount LIKE '%,%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_has_commas, SUM(CASE WHEN ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value FROM book_profiles;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN ratingCount LIKE '%,%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as still_has_commas, SUM(CASE WHEN ratingCount IS NOT NULL AND ratingCount != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_value FROM book_profiles;
